CustomField.description: Check this checkbox if you would like the Rent and Term on each of the Commercial Terms to be updated whenever Rent and/or Term are updated on the Prospect.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this checkbox if you would like the Rent and Term on each of the Commercial Terms to be updated whenever Rent and/or Term are updated on the Prospect.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2103 Update Rent & Term To CT?
